LinksMenu.Name: Module Support
LinksMenu.Label: Links
LinksMenu.Hint: Open WM5E documentation, issue tracker, and support links.
LinksMenu.Title: Resources & Support
LinksMenu.SupportMessage: Toss a Coin to your Bugbear

AutoMasteries.Name: Automatically Trigger Masteries
AutoMasteries.Hint: When enabled (each user must enable separately), relevant weapon masteries will be automatically triggered when making attacks with applicable weapons.

NickReminder.Name: Post Nick Reminder
NickReminder.Hint: When enabled, Nick posts its reminder message when the attack roll completes.

NpcMasteries.Name: Enable NPC Masteries
NpcMasteries.Hint: When enabled, NPC weapons with a configured mastery can use that mastery when making attacks.

Notifications.CleaveRequiresSuccess: Cleave can only be used on a successful attack roll.
Notifications.CleaveNoTargetsInRange: No valid targets in range for Cleave.
Notifications.GrazeRequiresFailure: Graze can only be used on a failed attack roll.
Notifications.GrazeRequiresPositiveModifier: Graze requires a positive ability modifier to deal damage.
Notifications.PushRequiresSuccess: Push can only be used on a successful attack roll.
Notifications.PushSizeLimit: You can only push large or smaller targets.
Notifications.SapRequiresSuccess: Sap can only be used on a successful attack roll.
Notifications.SlowRequiresSuccess: Slow can only be used on a successful attack roll.
Notifications.ToppleRequiresSuccess: Topple can only be used on a successful attack roll.
Notifications.VexRequiresSuccess: Vex can only be used on a successful attack roll.
Notifications.VexAlreadyApplied: Target is already affected by your Vex.
